title: Korbond CORE Mix Polyester Thread Selection by Korbond-12 x 32m spools – 10 Colours – 384 metres – Hand and Machine Sewing, Repairs, Crafting, White
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
100% spun polyester thread selection ensures excellent colour fastness and no shrinkage. Bobbin size: 2.8cm (Length) x 2cm (Diameter)

Includes the most popular thread colours, Choose from 10 different beautiful colours, Ideal for coordinating with any fabric – 2 x white, 2 x black, 1 x cream, 1 x pink, 1 x yellow, 1 x green, 1 x light Blue, 1 x red, 1 x Grey, 1 x navy blue – Total of 384 metres of thread
Suitable for hand sewing and for use with sewing machines, Ideal for small projects, repair, emergency mending, work clothes, beginners, starter kits and kids crafts
To view our full range, click on ''by Korbond'' Above to visit our store
description: From the manufacturer LARGE PACK Korbond Thread Set contains 12 spools of expert threads in 10 different colours! The great value set contains a total of 384m of thread! RANGE OF COLOURS Korbond Thread Packs contain 12 spools of 10 colours, giving you a wide selection meaning you always have the perfect thread for your project. HAND AND MACHINE SEWING The professional standard bobbins are ideal for both hand and machine sewing, so no matter if you are a beginner or expert crafter, this set is ideal. SEWING KIT ESSENTIAL Every sewing kit needs a good supply of threads to match any fabric you may need to work with. Korbond Thread Packs and a quick way to build up your thread collection ensuring you're prepared for any project.
